title: Translate application errors to status codes
scenario: HTTP status codes belong at the adapter edge. Translate typed application errors there instead of putting HTTP concepts in domain code.
instructions: Implement status_code(&CreateOrderUseCaseError) -> u16 with 400 for domain errors, 409 for repository conflicts, and 503 for repository unavailability.

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps boundary-http-status explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
